title: Horse info
description: Display horse speed, jumping power and stamina.
body:
# Horse info mod

Display horse speed, jumping power and height.

![example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be454eafd64ba0e4a48cf0aa143be509b39213df.png)

By riding a horse, information will be displayed on the left side of your inventory.


## Require

Horse info mod requires the [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) , [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) and [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config).

## Setting
Edit directly `config/horseinfo.json` 

``` json
{
  "showHud": true
}
```

You can also edit it in the game's config screen.
